code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut count = 0
mut in_tok = false
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    in_tok = false
  else
    if not in_tok
      in_tok = true
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let idx = count % 3
match idx
when 0
  println("Red")
when 1
  println("Green")
when 2
  println("Yellow")
when _
  println("Red")
end
